info.title: intent-csharp-metadata-synchronizer
info.description: The Intent C# Metadata Synchronizer CLI tool can be used to synchronize your C# files into an Intent Architect Services package.

options.name: --config-file
options.description: Path to a JSON formatted file containing options to use for execution of this tool as an alternative to using command line options. The --generate-config-file option can be used to generate a file with all the possible fields populated with null.

options.name: --generate-config-file
options.description: Scaffolds into the current working directory a "config.json" for use with the --config-file option. [default: False]

options.name: --domain-entities-folder
options.description: The physical folder path to scan for C# classes/records representing Domain Entities.

options.name: --domain-enums-folder
options.description: The physical folder path to scan for C# enums representing Domain Enums.

options.name: --domain-services-folder
options.description: The physical folder path to scan for C# classes/records representing Domain Services.

options.name: --domain-repositories-folder
options.description: The physical folder path to scan for C# classes/records representing Domain Repositories.

options.name: --domain-data-contracts-folder
options.description: The physical folder path to scan for C# classes/records representing Domain Data Contracts.

options.name: --service-enums-folder
options.description: The physical folder path to scan for C# enums representing Service Enums.

options.name: --service-dtos-folder
options.description: The physical folder path to scan for C# classes/records representing Service DTOs.

options.name: --value-objects-folder
options.description: The physical folder path to scan for C# classes/records representing Value Objects.

options.name: --event-messages-folder
options.description: The physical folder path to scan for C# classes/records representing Event Messages and Event DTOs.

options.name: --isln-file
options.description: The Intent Architect solution (.isln) file containing the Intent Architect Application into which to synchronize the metadata.

options.name: --application-name
options.description: The name of the Intent Architect Application (as per the Application Settings view) containing the Intent Architect Package into which to synchronize the metadata.

options.name: --package-id
options.description: The id of the Intent Architect Package containing the Intent Architect Package into which to synchronize the metadata.

options.name: --designer-name
options.description: The name of the Designer where the package is located. i.e. "Domain" or "Services"

options.name: --target-folder-id
options.description: The target folder within the Intent Architect package into which to synchronize the metadata. If unspecified then the metadata will be synchronized into the root of the Intent Architect package.
